sentences.arabic: فِي عَصْرِ الِانْتِشَارِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الطَّاغِي، انْصَهَرَتِ الْحُدُودُ الْفَاصِلَةُ بَيْنَ الْحَيَاةِ الْخَاصَّةِ وَالْعَامَّةِ فِي حَالَةٍ سَائِلَةٍ مِنَ التَّعَرِّي الْمُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: U eri sveprisutne digitalne ekspanzije, granice koje razdvajaju privatni i javni život stopile su se u fluidno stanje neprestane izloženosti.
sentences.translationEn: In the era of overwhelming digital expansion, the boundaries separating private and public life have dissolved into a fluid state of continuous exposure.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أَضْحَتِ التَّجَارِبُ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةُ، الَّتِي كَانَتْ يَوْمًا حَمِيمِيَّةً وَعَابِرَةً، تُنَسَّقُ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ لِتُقَدَّمَ قُرْبَانًا عَلَى مَذْبَحِ الِاعْتِرَافِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ljudska iskustva, koja su nekada bila intimna i prolazna, sada se pedantno uređuju kako bi bila prinesena kao žrtva na oltaru društvenog priznanja.
sentences.translationEn: Human experiences, which were once intimate and fleeting, are now meticulously curated to be offered as a sacrifice on the altar of social validation.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْفَرْدُ هُوَ الْمُهَنْدِسَ وَالسَّجِينَ فِي آنٍ وَاحِدٍ لِهَذَا "الْبَانُوبْتِيكُونِ" الرَّقْمِيِّ، حَيْثُ تُمَثِّلُ كُلُّ نَقْرَةٍ اعْتِرَافًا، وَكُلُّ إِعْجَابٍ قَيْدًا.
sentences.translation: Pojedinac je postao istovremeno i arhitekta i zatvorenik ovog digitalnog 'panoptikona', gdje svaki klik predstavlja priznanje, a svaki 'lajk' okov.
sentences.translationEn: The individual has become both the architect and the prisoner of this digital 'panopticon,' where every click represents a confession and every like a shackle.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتُ، تِلْكَ الْحَكَمُ الْخَفِيُّ لِلْمَصِيرِ الْحَدِيثِ، بِتَشْرِيحِ تَفْضِيلَاتِنَا لِصِيَاغَةِ نُسْخَةٍ سِلْعِيَّةٍ مِنْ أَرْوَاحِنَا ذَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Algoritmi, ti skriveni arbitri moderne sudbine, seciraju naše preferencije kako bi oblikovali komodifikovanu verziju samih naših duša.
sentences.translationEn: Algorithms, those hidden arbiters of modern destiny, dissect our preferences to forge a commodified version of our very souls.

sentences.arabic: يُوَلِّدُ هَذَا السَّعْيُ الْحَثِيثُ نَحْوَ الظُّهُورِ قَلَقًا وُجُودِيًّا عَمِيقًا، إِذْ يُخْتَزَلُ الذَّاتُ فِي مَجْمُوعَةٍ مِنَ الْمَقَايِيسِ الْقَابِلَةِ لِلْكَمِّ.
sentences.translation: Ova neprestana težnja za vidljivošću rađa duboku egzistencijalnu tjeskobu, jer se sopstvo svodi na skup kvantifikovanih metrika.
sentences.translationEn: This relentless pursuit of visibility generates a profound existential anxiety, as the self is reduced to a set of quantifiable metrics.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَتَّمُ عَلَيْنَا مُوَاجَهَةُ الْحَقِيقَةِ الْمُرَّةِ بِأَنَّ بَصَمَاتِنَا الرَّقْمِيَّةَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ آثَارٍ لِلْبَيَانَاتِ، بَلْ هِيَ بَقَايَا مُمَزَّقَةٌ لِخُصُوصِيَّتِنَا الْمَفْقُودَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo se suočiti s gorkom istinom da naši digitalni otisci nisu samo tragovi podataka, već rastrgani ostaci naše izgubljene privatnosti.
sentences.translationEn: We must face the bitter truth that our digital footprints are not merely data trails, but the fragmented remains of our lost privacy.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، فَإِنَّ اسْتِعَادَةَ قَدَاسَةِ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ تَتَطَلَّبُ اسْتِرْدَادًا جَذْرِيًّا لِلْحَقِّ فِي النِّسْيَانِ فِي زَمَنٍ لَا يَعْرِفُ الْهُمُودَ.
sentences.translation: U konačnici, vraćanje svetosti privatnosti zahtijeva radikalno vraćanje prava na zaborav u vremenu koje nikada ne miruje.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, restoring the sanctity of privacy requires a radical reclamation of the right to be forgotten in an age that never sleeps.
